_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Asset and configuration management involves managing the life cycle of IT assets, such as hardware, software, intellectual property, licences and warranties, the configuration of components, and the relationships between them. Consideration is given to the usage, disposal, compliance, inventory, sustainability, cost optimisation and protection of the IT asset portfolio.
reference_document_element_description: Manage development, staging, and production environments for data applications, including environment configuration, dependency specification, secrets management, and environment parity maintenance.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-007 (AB, cosine: 0.496), DQ-T-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.460).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.458). Shared vocabulary: [configuration, management]. DDaT-only terms [asset, assets, compliance, components, consideration, cost] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, data, dependency, development, environment, environments] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.854, R=0.870). Balanced P/R — the 49-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Asset and configuration management involves managing the life cycle of IT assets" and "Manage development, staging, and production environments for data applications," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.506 ≈ STS 0.458 (gap 0.048). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [configuration, management] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.8%. Shared tokens: [configuration, management]. DDaT-only: [asset, assets, compliance, components, consideration, cost]. WIDAI-only: [applications, data, dependency, development, environment, environments].
